textByHash.6d17fae39702d42b376e2cd419c50598b5a23553: No time to talk, human. That gryphon caused no end of problems that need to be dealt with. You'll need to come back later.
textByHash.00034ab010700fefdda9f38001d5fa3d7941f725: Ah, you must be the new tourist.
textByHash.8b82e2bf2ba739665b64d5bd897686b81f6a3833: Well, in that case, you should get stuck right in.
textByHash.e7b4a281c40981dd31db5b7537801ed11a2ce21e: Not bad on those repairs. Still plenty of things I need to do though. If you need something, you'll have to come back later.
textByHash.23df08eb21c431aa993629078d23ffbfdec50abd: Human. Do you wish to hunt? If so, I have supplies for you.
